title: ma`at #4591
definition:
1) to be or become small, be few, be diminished
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to diminish
        1a2) to be too small
    1b) (Piel) to become few
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to make small, make few, diminish
        1c2) to give less
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to be or become small, diminished, or few
